ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Company's registration number */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "financial_year_start" TEXT /* Start date of the company's financial year */,
  "financial_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the company's financial year */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement type */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (e.g., Balance Sheet, Income Statement) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial statement type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the financial statement (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial item (e.g., Cash & Short-Term Investments, Accounts Receivable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial item */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of financial statement the item belongs to */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the financial item (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the financial item (e.g., monetary, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_items_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial item */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period for which the data is reported */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial item for the period */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES financial_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial ratio */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "ratio_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial ratio (e.g., Current Ratio, Debt-to-Equity Ratio) */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period for which the ratio is calculated */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial ratio */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_ratios_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_ratios_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpi_definitions" (
  "kpi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI */,
  "kpi_name" TEXT /* Name of the KPI (e.g., EBITDA, Revenue Growth) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the KPI */,
  "calculation_formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the KPI */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the KPI calculation (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the KPI (e.g., USD, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpi_values" (
  "kpi_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI value */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "kpi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the KPI */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period for which the KPI is calculated */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the KPI */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the KPI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpi_values_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpi_values_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpi_values_kpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("kpi_id") REFERENCES kpi_definitions ("kpi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial report (e.g., Annual Report, Quarterly Report) */,
  "period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "period_end" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., published, draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., SEC Filings, Company Website) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., CSV, Excel, API) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the imported data */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the imported data file in MB */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failed, pending) */,
  "import_method" TEXT /* Method used for the import (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "import_log" TEXT /* Log of the import process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, auditor, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., financial analyst, auditor, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchy level of the role */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the versioned data */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the versioned data file in MB */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., current, archived) */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data error */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of the error (e.g., missing data, incorrect value) */,
  "error_description" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "detected_date" TEXT /* Date the error was detected */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the error was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of how the error was resolved */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the error (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_errors_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_errors_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., note, warning) */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
